zh.Worleston, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾沃萊斯頓
zh.of Worleston, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾沃萊斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elen Worleston於大約1327年出生在英國英格蘭爾沃萊斯頓時，她的父親John de Worleston44歲，母親Mrs John de Worleston42歲。她於大約1363年與Richard de Henhull Esquire在英國英格蘭爾亨爾結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年之後。

zh-hans.of Worleston, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾沃萊斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elen Worleston于大约1327年出生在英国英格兰爾沃萊斯頓时，她的父亲John de Worleston44岁，母亲Mrs John de Worleston42岁。她于大约1363年与Richard de Henhull Esquire在英国英格兰爾亨爾结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Elen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

en.lifeSummary: When Elen Worleston was born about 1327, in Worleston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Worleston, was 44 and her mother, Mrs John de Worleston, was 42. She married Richard de Henhull Esquire about 1363, in Henhull, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died after 1387.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elen Worleston est née environ 1327, à Worleston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Worleston, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mrs John de Worleston, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Henhull Esquire environ 1363, à Henhull, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1387.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elen Worleston um 1327 in Worleston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Worleston 44 und ihre Mutter Mrs John de Worleston 42. Sie hat um 1363 in Henhull, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Richard de Henhull Esquire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1387.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elen Worleston è nata il circa 1327 nel Worleston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Worleston, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Mrs John de Worleston, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Henhull Esquire circa 1363, nel Henhull, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1387.

ja.lifeSummary: Elen Worlestonが約1327年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウオルレストンで生まれた時，父John de Worlestonは44歳，母Mrs John de Worlestonは42歳であった。約1363年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヘンハルでRichard de Henhull Esquireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elen Worleston(이)가 대략 1327년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Worleston(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs John de Worleston(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1363년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헨훌에서 Richard de Henhull Esquire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elen Worleston nasceu aproximadamente 1327, em Worleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Worleston, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John de Worleston, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Henhull Esquire aproximadamente 1363, em Henhull, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1387.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elen Worleston родилась около 1327 г. в местности ворльстон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Worleston было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs John de Worleston, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Henhull Esquire около 1363 г. в местности хенулл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1387 г.

Se casó con Richard de Henhull Esquire aproximadamente 1363, en Henhull, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió después de 1387.
